resource.title: checking functionatiy of feelts,  (tests)
resource.prompt: can you add  fa fucniton that remembers the repo next time? so if i send it from jules, it'll attach itself tot hat repo, and remmber it

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
feat: remember last used repository in new session dialog

Saves the last used source repository (sourceId) to localStorage
when creating a session or selecting a repository in the dropdown.
When opening the dialog again, it defaults to the last used repository
if it still exists in the user's available repositories.
